[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00010001 2
2 00000001 1
3 10000000 1
4 11001100 4
5 11000100 3
6 01000000 1
7 00100010 2

01 10 00000001 1 match 2
12 21 10000000 1 match 3
23 32 11001100 4 match 4
34 43 11000100 3 match 5
45 54 01000000 1 match 6
56 65 00100010 2 match 7
67 76 10010010 3
70 07 00010001 2 match 1

02 20 00001100 2
13 31 10000001 2
24 42 11000100 3 match 5
35 53 01000010 2
46 64 10000100 2
57 75 01000010 2
60 06 00010100 2
71 17 10000001 2

03 30 00001101 3
14 41 10000000 1 match 3
25 52 01100000 2
36 63 10000110 3
47 74 11000000 2
50 05 00000000 a match 0
61 16 10000000 1 match 3
72 27 11000000 2

04 40 00000100 1
15 51 00000000 a match 0
26 62 10100100 3
37 73 11000011 4
[completion]
